description: Composition Navy blue camouflage trousers with a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, comfortable waistband with loops, button and metal zipper closure on the front, and stitch detailing on the front of the legs Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not soak or bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron Don that casually stylish look with this navy blue camoflage trousers from probase. Designed with the choicest of fabrics to offer a comfortable, fresh feel, this trouser makes for a perfect casual wear. Pair this with tees and black sneakers to look every bit like the casually handsome guy that you are. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 41.5" Height-6.1", Waist-31"
